message:
feat(witness): reset abandoned beads when dead polecat detected

When DetectZombiePolecats finds a zombie with a hooked/in_progress bead,
reset the bead to open status and clear assignee so the deacon can
re-dispatch it to an available polecat. Sends RECOVERED_BEAD mail to
deacon for each recovered bead.

Closes: gt-c3lgp

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
